key_implications: Support policy updates may change founder application priorities.
Platform fee shifts alter domestic AI vendor margin models.

one_line_checkpoint.body: 국내 AI 정책·스타트업·플랫폼 신호가 founder/operator money/work 결정에 어떻게 겹치는지 확인하세요.
